triggers: cwd != repo root when git runs hooks

edgeCases.scenario: plain git commit in a linked worktree of an overlaid repo
edgeCases.expected: gates run once against this worktree's .devkit/hooks
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: resolves the repo root — fires from a subdir
edgeCases.notes: shim uses git rev-parse --show-toplevel, not cwd-relative

edgeCases.scenario: git -C <overlaid-repo> commit from an unrelated cwd / a package subdir
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: resolves the repo root — fires from a subdir

edgeCases.scenario: cwd has its own .devkit/hooks but the repo root does not
edgeCases.expected: no mis-fire against the wrong dir
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: does NOT mis-fire on a stray .devkit/hooks in cwd

triggers: overlaid husky repo with no committed .husky/pre-commit

edgeCases.scenario: husky repo, pre-push committed but NO committed pre-commit, plain git commit
edgeCases.expected: gates do not run (husky _/h:6 exits before sourcing init.sh) — documented hole
edgeCases.notes: closing it needs a git-ignored .husky/pre-commit stub — out of overlay's invisibility budget

triggers: gates-only env guard before chain exec

edgeCases.scenario: post-reclaim plain commit, shim installed, gate passes
edgeCases.expected: gates run once with DEVKIT_VIA_HUSKY_INIT=1; committed hook runs once; no double-run
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: runs the overlay gates with DEVKIT_VIA_HUSKY_INIT=1

edgeCases.scenario: post-reclaim plain commit, a gate fails (overlay hook exit 1)
edgeCases.expected: commit aborts; exit 1 propagates through the sourced init.sh
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: propagates a failing gate to abort the commit

edgeCases.scenario: git ci alias active AND shim installed
edgeCases.expected: gates run exactly once (alias re-points → husky bypassed → shim not sourced)
coveredBy: doctor.mjs: shim + alias don't double-run note
edgeCases.notes: alias path bypasses husky's _/h entirely, so init.sh is never sourced

edgeCases.scenario: install onto a pre-existing user init.sh (with/without trailing newline)
edgeCases.expected: user content preserved, one devkit block
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: appends onto a pre-existing user init.sh
overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: is idempotent — re-install is byte-stable

edgeCases.scenario: clean --global with user content before and after the block
edgeCases.expected: only the devkit block removed, file kept
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: remove strips only the devkit block, keeping user content before AND after
overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: remove unlinks a devkit-only init.sh

edgeCases.scenario: per-repo devkit clean with the shim installed
edgeCases.expected: global shim untouched (inert); only clean --global removes it
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: removes the machine-global shim; plain clean leaves it

triggers: HUSKY env, PATH ordering, sourced-global-runs-repo-local, $0 across shells

edgeCases.scenario: HUSKY=0 git commit in overlaid repo
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: honors HUSKY=0 — skips the gates
edgeCases.notes: shim self-checks HUSKY=0 because _/h's own HUSKY=0 exit is after it sources init.sh

edgeCases.scenario: shim runs overlay hook before _/h exports node_modules/.bin
edgeCases.expected: overlay hook resolves its own tools by explicit path / own PATH_SETUP
coveredBy: husky-block.mjs OVERLAY_LINT_STEPS uses node_modules/.bin/... explicit paths
edgeCases.notes: true today; guard against a future bare-bin gate

edgeCases.expected: ${0##*/} == pre-commit (stub sources h, h sources init.sh; $0 inherited)
coveredBy: overlay-global-hook.test.mjs: dispatch runs under sh with $0 basename = hook name
